subject: math
activity_templates: A 3rd-grade intro-to-fractions worksheet. 6 cute cartoon shapes (circles, rectangles, stars) each partially shaded; child writes the fraction represented. Fraction key at the top. {{character}} points to the first shape.
A 'shade the fraction' worksheet. 6 blank shapes, each labeled with a target fraction (1/2, 1/3, 2/4, 3/5, 1/6, 3/8); child shades in the correct portion. {{character}} holds a crayon.
A compare-fractions worksheet. 5 pairs of fractions (with visual models underneath each pair). Child writes <, >, or = between them. {{character}} cheers.

An equivalent-fractions worksheet. 4 pairs of pie charts showing equivalent fractions (e.g. 1/2 and 2/4). Child writes the two equivalent fractions below each pair. {{character}} points between the pies.
